title: Self-Prioritising GRCS Audit Policy and Execution Schema (Variant v3)
description: Defines scheduling, execution policies, and enforcement actions for continuous control verification with autonomous engine integration.

autonomousPolicyRules.description: Dynamic scheduling and execution policies with autonomous engine integration, incorporating variant-specific considerations.

controlVerificationInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds for control verification ( referenced by controlId ), with adaptive threshold based on job performance metrics.

contextWindow.description: Number of preceding jobs required for chained context, taking into account variant-specific rules for job data aggregation.

chainedContext.description: Stored context of previous jobs, with variant-specific format and data structure modifications.

variantSpecificFlags.description: Variant-specific flags controlling scheduling and execution parameters.

experimentalMode.description: Variant-specific flag enabling experimental mode for testing and validation.

runtimeOptimisation.description: Variant-specific flag controlling runtime optimisation for improved performance.

variantSpecificData.description: Variant-specific job data, incorporating modifications for v3 variant.

jobData.description: Job-specific data, with potential variant-specific format changes.

executionMetadata.description: Metadata related to job execution, such as start and end timestamps.

policyOverrides.description: Policy-specific overrides for scheduling and execution, incorporating variant-specific considerations.

policyParameter.description: Policy parameter to be overridden, such as the control verification interval.

newValue.description: New value for the policy parameter to be applied during scheduling and execution.
